Skip to contents
ggsegYan 1.0.1
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Yan 17-Network 300-Parcel Atlas

Source: R/data.R
yan17_300.Rd

Brain atlas for the Yan et al. (2023) homotopic cortical parcellation with 300 parcels aligned to 17 resting-state networks (Yeo et al., 2011). Contains both 2D polygon geometry for ggseg::geom_brain() and 3D vertex indices for ggseg3d::ggseg3d().

Usage

yan17_300()

Value

A ggseg.formats::ggseg_atlas object (cortical).

References

Yan X, et al. (2023). "Homotopic local-global parcellation of the human cerebral cortex from resting-state functional connectivity." NeuroImage, 273:120010. doi:10.1016/j.neuroimage.2023.120010

See also

Other ggseg_atlases: yan17_100(), yan17_1000(), yan17_200(), yan17_400(), yan17_500(), yan17_600(), yan17_700(), yan17_800(), yan17_900(), yan7_100(), yan7_1000(), yan7_200(), yan7_300(), yan7_400(), yan7_500(), yan7_600(), yan7_700(), yan7_800(), yan7_900()

Other cortical_atlases: yan17_100(), yan17_1000(), yan17_200(), yan17_400(), yan17_500(), yan17_600(), yan17_700(), yan17_800(), yan17_900(), yan7_100(), yan7_1000(), yan7_200(), yan7_300(), yan7_400(), yan7_500(), yan7_600(), yan7_700(), yan7_800(), yan7_900()

Examples

yan17_300()
#> 
#> ── yan17_300 ggseg atlas ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#> Type: cortical
#> Regions: 300
#> Hemispheres: left, right
#> Views: inferior, lateral, medial, superior
#> Palette: ✔
#> Rendering: ✔ ggseg
#> ✔ ggseg3d (vertices)
#> ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#> # A tibble: 300 × 3
#>     hemi  region                             label                              
#>     <chr> <chr>                              <chr>                              
#>   1 left  17networks_LH_TempPar_Temp_1       lh_17networks_LH_TempPar_Temp_1    
#>   2 left  17networks_LH_TempPar_Temp_2       lh_17networks_LH_TempPar_Temp_2    
#>   3 left  17networks_LH_TempPar_Temp_3       lh_17networks_LH_TempPar_Temp_3    
#>   4 left  17networks_LH_TempPar_Temp_4       lh_17networks_LH_TempPar_Temp_4    
#>   5 left  17networks_LH_DefaultC_IPL_1       lh_17networks_LH_DefaultC_IPL_1    
#>   6 left  17networks_LH_DefaultC_IPL_2       lh_17networks_LH_DefaultC_IPL_2    
#>   7 left  17networks_LH_DefaultC_PHC_1       lh_17networks_LH_DefaultC_PHC_1    
#>   8 left  17networks_LH_DefaultC_PHC_2       lh_17networks_LH_DefaultC_PHC_2    
#>   9 left  17networks_LH_DefaultC_RSC_1       lh_17networks_LH_DefaultC_RSC_1    
#>  10 left  17networks_LH_DefaultC_RSC_2       lh_17networks_LH_DefaultC_RSC_2    
#>  11 left  17networks_LH_DefaultB_IPL_1       lh_17networks_LH_DefaultB_IPL_1    
#>  12 left  17networks_LH_DefaultB_IPL_2       lh_17networks_LH_DefaultB_IPL_2    
#>  13 left  17networks_LH_DefaultB_IPL_3       lh_17networks_LH_DefaultB_IPL_3    
#>  14 left  17networks_LH_DefaultB_PFCd_1      lh_17networks_LH_DefaultB_PFCd_1   
#>  15 left  17networks_LH_DefaultB_PFCd_2      lh_17networks_LH_DefaultB_PFCd_2   
#>  16 left  17networks_LH_DefaultB_PFCd_3      lh_17networks_LH_DefaultB_PFCd_3   
#>  17 left  17networks_LH_DefaultB_PFCd_4      lh_17networks_LH_DefaultB_PFCd_4   
#>  18 left  17networks_LH_DefaultB_PFCv_1      lh_17networks_LH_DefaultB_PFCv_1   
#>  19 left  17networks_LH_DefaultB_PFCv_2      lh_17networks_LH_DefaultB_PFCv_2   
#>  20 left  17networks_LH_DefaultB_PFCv_3      lh_17networks_LH_DefaultB_PFCv_3   
#>  21 left  17networks_LH_DefaultB_PFCv_4      lh_17networks_LH_DefaultB_PFCv_4   
#>  22 left  17networks_LH_DefaultB_PFCv_5      lh_17networks_LH_DefaultB_PFCv_5   
#>  23 left  17networks_LH_DefaultB_TempPole    lh_17networks_LH_DefaultB_TempPole 
#>  24 left  17networks_LH_DefaultB_Temp_1      lh_17networks_LH_DefaultB_Temp_1   
#>  25 left  17networks_LH_DefaultB_Temp_2      lh_17networks_LH_DefaultB_Temp_2   
#>  26 left  17networks_LH_DefaultB_Temp_3      lh_17networks_LH_DefaultB_Temp_3   
#>  27 left  17networks_LH_DefaultA_FPole       lh_17networks_LH_DefaultA_FPole    
#>  28 left  17networks_LH_DefaultA_IPL_1       lh_17networks_LH_DefaultA_IPL_1    
#>  29 left  17networks_LH_DefaultA_PCC_1       lh_17networks_LH_DefaultA_PCC_1    
#>  30 left  17networks_LH_DefaultA_PCC_2       lh_17networks_LH_DefaultA_PCC_2    
#>  31 left  17networks_LH_DefaultA_PCC_3       lh_17networks_LH_DefaultA_PCC_3    
#>  32 left  17networks_LH_DefaultA_PFCd_1      lh_17networks_LH_DefaultA_PFCd_1   
#>  33 left  17networks_LH_DefaultA_PFCd_2      lh_17networks_LH_DefaultA_PFCd_2   
#>  34 left  17networks_LH_DefaultA_PFCm_1      lh_17networks_LH_DefaultA_PFCm_1   
#>  35 left  17networks_LH_DefaultA_PFCm_2      lh_17networks_LH_DefaultA_PFCm_2   
#>  36 left  17networks_LH_DefaultA_PFCm_3      lh_17networks_LH_DefaultA_PFCm_3   
#>  37 left  17networks_LH_ContC_PCC            lh_17networks_LH_ContC_PCC         
#>  38 left  17networks_LH_ContC_pCun_1         lh_17networks_LH_ContC_pCun_1      
#>  39 left  17networks_LH_ContC_pCun_2         lh_17networks_LH_ContC_pCun_2      
#>  40 left  17networks_LH_ContB_FPole_1        lh_17networks_LH_ContB_FPole_1     
#>  41 left  17networks_LH_ContB_IPL_1          lh_17networks_LH_ContB_IPL_1       
#>  42 left  17networks_LH_ContB_IPS            lh_17networks_LH_ContB_IPS         
#>  43 left  17networks_LH_ContB_PFCl           lh_17networks_LH_ContB_PFCl        
#>  44 left  17networks_LH_ContB_PFCv_1         lh_17networks_LH_ContB_PFCv_1      
#>  45 left  17networks_LH_ContB_Temp           lh_17networks_LH_ContB_Temp        
#>  46 left  17networks_LH_ContA_Cingm          lh_17networks_LH_ContA_Cingm       
#>  47 left  17networks_LH_ContA_IPS_1          lh_17networks_LH_ContA_IPS_1       
#>  48 left  17networks_LH_ContA_IPS_2          lh_17networks_LH_ContA_IPS_2       
#>  49 left  17networks_LH_ContA_IPS_3          lh_17networks_LH_ContA_IPS_3       
#>  50 left  17networks_LH_ContA_PFCd           lh_17networks_LH_ContA_PFCd        
#>  51 left  17networks_LH_ContA_PFCl_1         lh_17networks_LH_ContA_PFCl_1      
#>  52 left  17networks_LH_ContA_PFCl_2         lh_17networks_LH_ContA_PFCl_2      
#>  53 left  17networks_LH_ContA_PFCl_3         lh_17networks_LH_ContA_PFCl_3      
#>  54 left  17networks_LH_ContA_PFCl_4         lh_17networks_LH_ContA_PFCl_4      
#>  55 left  17networks_LH_ContA_PrC            lh_17networks_LH_ContA_PrC         
#>  56 left  17networks_LH_ContA_PrCv           lh_17networks_LH_ContA_PrCv        
#>  57 left  17networks_LH_ContA_TempOcc        lh_17networks_LH_ContA_TempOcc     
#>  58 left  17networks_LH_LimbicA_ST           lh_17networks_LH_LimbicA_ST

#>  64 left  17networks_LH_LimbicB_FPole_2      lh_17networks_LH_LimbicB_FPole_2

#>  71 left  17networks_LH_SalVentAttnB_Ins_2   lh_17networks_LH_SalVentAttnB_Ins_2
#>  72 left  17networks_LH_SalVentAttnB_PFCl_1  lh_17networks_LH_SalVentAttnB_PFCl…
#>  73 left  17networks_LH_SalVentAttnA_FrMed_1 lh_17networks_LH_SalVentAttnA_FrMe…
#>  74 left  17networks_LH_SalVentAttnA_FrMed_2 lh_17networks_LH_SalVentAttnA_FrMe…
#>  75 left  17networks_LH_SalVentAttnA_FrOper  lh_17networks_LH_SalVentAttnA_FrOp…
#>  76 left  17networks_LH_SalVentAttnA_IPL_1   lh_17networks_LH_SalVentAttnA_IPL_1
